letter:
To whom it may concern,

Gladys served as our Digital PR Data Lead for two years. She consistently delivered high-quality data analyses and automated workflows that materially improved our campaign reach and reporting accuracy. Her attention to detail, communication skills, and expertise in building reproducible data pipelines were instrumental to our success.

Best regards,
Alex Morgan
Director of Communications

Gladys contributed to our fintech integrations by building resilient ETL pipelines and streamlining data ingestion from public institutions. She is proactive, reliable, and a pleasure to work with.

Sincerely,
Priya Patel
CTO
